get.description:
Deep readiness probe — checks all infrastructure dependencies.
Returns 200 if ready, 503 if any critical dependency is down.

post.description: Classify a document image into a typology.
Extract structured data from a classified document.
Evaluate document authenticity and return fraud score.

Extract text from a PDF using Azure Computer Vision OCR.

Accepts PDF bytes via multipart upload. Falls back to empty text
if OCR is not enabled or fails.

Evaluate whether a document image is legible enough for OCR processing.

Uses LLM vision (Haiku — cheapest tier) to score readability on a 0.0–1.0
scale and classify the document as 'legivel' or 'baixa_legibilidade'.

Full document processing: OCR (optional) + classify + extract + fraud score.

Credit gate is checked once before any LLM work begins.

When ``use_ocr`` is True and OCR is enabled, text is extracted from the
PDF first via Azure Computer Vision. If OCR returns text, it is included
in the response. Classification and extraction still use the image/PDF
via LLM Vision for highest accuracy.

Run a coordinated multi-agent audit with isolated workers.

Spawns one worker per scope in parallel, then consolidates all findings
through a parecer worker. Each worker operates with a restricted context
so failures in one scope cannot corrupt results in another.

Scopes available: ``extraction``, ``compliance``, ``financial``, ``integration``

schema.title: Response Coordinate Audit Api V1 Coordinate Post

get.description:
Poll coordination task status by task ID.

Returns the current state of a coordinated audit task including worker
statuses and results when completed.

schema.title: Response Get Coordination Status Api V1 Coordinate  Task Id  Get

post.description:
Trigger autonomous memory consolidation for a tenant.

Scans the last 30 days of user memories, identifies cross-user patterns
and promotes them to tenant-level memory.

Protected: service-key only (no end-user access).

Execute golden set evaluation against stored fixtures.

Query params
------------
document_type : str, optional
    Filter to a single doc type slug (e.g. rg, cnh, matricula_imovel).
tier : str, optional
    Filter to a quality tier: clean | degraded | edge_case | adversarial.

Ingest an external artifact by URL, store it in S3, and optionally extract fields.

Downloads the artifact from ``artifact_file_url``, stores it under
``{tenant_id}/artifacts/{artifact_id}.{ext}`` in the documents bucket,
then — if the artifact is a PDF or image — runs LLM extraction and returns
any extracted fields.

Create a new prompt template.

The prompt is created at version 1 and marked as active by default.

get.description:
List all prompt templates.

By default, soft-deleted prompts are excluded. Use ``include_deleted=true``
to include them in the response — they will have ``deleted=true`` set.
Use ``active_only=true`` to return only active (non-deleted) prompts.

parameters.name: include_deleted

schema.description: Include soft-deleted prompts in the response. Deleted prompts are annotated with deleted=True. Has no effect when active_only=true.
schema.title: Include Deleted

parameters.description: Include soft-deleted prompts in the response. Deleted prompts are annotated with deleted=True. Has no effect when active_only=true.

schema.title: Response List Prompts Api V1 Prompts Get

get.description: Retrieve a single prompt by ID.

patch.description:
Update a prompt template.

If ``content`` or ``variables`` are changed, the version is bumped
automatically to maintain an audit trail.

delete.description:
Soft-delete a prompt (sets is_active=False).

The prompt remains in the store for auditing; it will no longer
appear in ``active_only`` filtered listings.

post.description:
Send a message to the Consultor IA and receive a streamed SSE response.

Emits events:
- ``{"type": "token", "content": "..."}`` — incremental response tokens
- ``{"type": "sources", "sources": [...]}`` — document/rule references found
- ``{"type": "suggestions", "suggestions": [...]}`` — 3 follow-up questions
- ``{"type": "done", "session_id": "..."}`` — signals end of stream

Finalise a chat session: extract long-term memories and clear the session.

Should be called when the user explicitly closes the chat or after a
configurable inactivity timeout.

get.description: Return the full message history for a session.

AutoDreamResponse.title: AutoDreamResponse
AutoDreamResponse.description: Result of an auto-dream consolidation run.

CoordinateRequest.description: Request to run a coordinated multi-agent audit.

PromptUpdate.title: PromptUpdate
PromptUpdate.description:
Schema for updating an existing prompt.

Only supplied fields are applied. Updating content or variables
bumps the version automatically.
